task_completion.description: Write SQL to create the customer_lifetime_value table
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SQL script contains a 'CREATE TABLE customer_lifetime_value' statement defining the 11 required columns (CustomerId as PK, FirstName, LastName, Email, Country, TotalSpent, InvoiceCount, FirstPurchaseDate, LastPurchaseDate, AvgInvoiceValue, CustomerSegment).

task_completion.description: Write SQL to populate the table with segmentation logic

task_completion.description: Write SQL to create the required indexes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SQL script contains 'CREATE INDEX idx_clv_segment' on the CustomerSegment column and 'CREATE INDEX idx_clv_country' on the Country column.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The view 'vw_monthly_revenue' must have exactly these columns: Year, Month, TotalRevenue, InvoiceCount, UniqueCustomers. The table 'customer_lifetime_value' must have exactly 11 columns: CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Email, Country, TotalSpent, InvoiceCount, FirstPurchaseDate, LastPurchaseDate, AvgInvoiceValue, CustomerSegment. The segmentation logic must use thresholds: High (>=40.0), Medium (20.0 to <40.0), Low (<20.0). The indexes must be named 'idx_clv_segment' and 'idx_clv_country'. The final script must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/analytics_schema.sql'.
